# Convergence render-ledger: human-facing, provisional, notAuthority

## Context

Leaf 3 of epic #14581 (Convergence-weighted Golden Path), graduated from Discussion #14548. This is the **render leaf**: it renders the convergence snapshot as a human-facing ledger — provisional-labeled, `notAuthority` — the concrete surface the Leaf 1 (#14633) render-target resolved to. Long-run home: a terrain panel in the FM cockpit.

## The Problem

Convergence output is **decision-support for humans**, explicitly **not** an authority agents consume (the OQ8 self-fulfilling firewall must hold end-to-end, not just at compute). If the ledger were treated as ground truth by any agent boot-path, convergence would re-enter generation and become self-fulfilling. So the render must:

1. Present the snapshot as a **provisional** artifact — convergence is a hypothesis about invariance, never a mandate.
2. Carry a **`notAuthority`** flag so no agent boot-path treats it as ground truth — the firewall preserved from schema (Leaf 1) through compute (Leaf 2) to render (Leaf 3).

## The Architectural Reality

- **Consumer:** humans (a maintainer reading the terrain of which sub-goals are cross-future-invariant). NOT agents.
- **Home surface:** a terrain panel in the FM cockpit (agents never boot from the cockpit); interim home is a standalone ledger artifact.
- Consumes Leaf 2's compute output over Leaf 1's canonical-id schema. This leaf is the human-facing terminus of the firewall chain.

## The Fix

- Render the convergence snapshot as a **human-facing ledger**, provisional-labeled.
- Attach the **`notAuthority`** flag; assert no agent boot-path consumes the ledger (firewall preserved).
- Target the **FM-cockpit terrain panel** as the home surface (interim: standalone ledger artifact).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Convergence snapshot rendered as a human-facing ledger, provisional-labeled.
- [ ] `notAuthority` flag present; a test asserts no agent boot-path consumes the ledger (firewall preserved end-to-end).
- [ ] Renders Leaf 2's compute output over Leaf 1's canonical-id schema (no re-compute, no id re-derivation).
- [ ] Home surface named and wired to the interim standalone ledger artifact; FM-cockpit terrain panel declared as the long-run home.
- [ ] Coverage for provisional / `notAuthority` labeling + the no-boot-path-consumption invariant.

## Out of Scope

- Compute (Leaf 2) and schema (Leaf 1 / #14633).
- The fold-rung deliverable (gated).
- Full FM-cockpit terrain-panel UI polish (this leaf ships the ledger + labeling + firewall assertion; cockpit panel visual integration is tracked with the FM cockpit lane).

## Related

Epic #14581 · blocked-by Leaf 2 (needs compute output) · Discussion #14548 · FM cockpit lane (#13015 family) as the long-run home surface.

## Decision Record impact

`aligned-with ADR-0023`; `depends-on ADR-0024` (renders the Leaf 1 node class). No new ADR authority introduced.

Origin Session ID: 9a6b25ba-1dd8-4269-8fbf-57a461fd0978

- 2026-07-04T08:58:08Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `131c41d` - "feat(graph): convergence render-ledger — human-facing, notAuthority, firewalled (#14636)

Leaf 3 of epic #14581 — the human-facing terminus of the convergence firewall chain. Projects Leaf 2's
compute output (merged b76a301fdd) over Leaf 1's canonical-id schema into a PROVISIONAL, notAuthority ledger:

- convergenceRenderLedger.mjs: pure fail-open projection. buildConvergenceRenderLedger({snapshots,
  independenceBudget, manifest}) -> a frozen ledger; renderConvergenceLedgerText(ledger) -> the interim
  standalone markdown artifact. Firewall flags (notAuthority, agentBootConsumable:false, home) are sourced
  VERBATIM from the schema's resolveRenderTarget() — single source, chain preserved schema->render. No
  re-compute, no id re-derivation (OQ1 anchor stays put). The four contract axes render SEPARATE, never
  flattened. Run-level OQ7 independence budget + OQ8 firewall attestation ride along as decision-support;
  a firewall-compromised upstream run is flagged, not silently trusted.

- Firewall preserved STRUCTURALLY, not just by flag: a spec scans the agent boot-path (ai/daemons/** + the
  golden-path synthesis modules) and asserts none import the ledger. The sanctioned future consumer is the
  human-facing FM-cockpit terrain panel, never a boot-path surface.

Renders real Leaf 2 output in-test (computeConvergenceSnapshots -> buildConvergenceRenderLedger). 9 specs
green: provisional/notAuthority labeling, structural firewall, real-compute rendering, axes-separate,
terrain sort, fail-open, standalone-artifact text.

Co-Authored-By: Ada (Claude Opus 4.8) <ada@neomjs.dev>"
- 2026-07-04T08:59:16Z @neo-opus-ada cross-referenced by PR #14725
- 2026-07-04T09:28:50Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `e633bce` - "fix(graph): render row provenance + capture timestamp in the ledger artifact (#14636)

Addresses @neo-fable's cross-family pre-review on PR #14725 (both non-blocking, both agreed):

- Finding 1 (provenance): renderConvergenceLedgerText dropped row provenance, so the standalone artifact
  showed confident weights untraceable to their producing run — authority-by-typography under the
  notAuthority banner, the exact failure the leaf exists to prevent. Now surfaced as a shared-run
  Provenance (OQ1) header when every row agrees, widening to a per-row column only when rows disagree
  (no false shared-run claim).

- Finding 2 (timestamp): the artifact never rendered generatedAt, leaving it staleness-illegible against
  remeasureAt discipline. Now rendered as a Generated at line (explicit unstamped state when now was not
  injected). Kept now-injection over a real-clock default to preserve purity/determinism, consistent with
  the Leaf 1 schema sibling; the caller injects now at render time.

10 specs green (+1: per-row Provenance column when rows disagree).

Co-Authored-By: Ada (Claude Opus 4.8) <ada@neomjs.dev>"
- 2026-07-04T09:48:30Z @neo-opus-ada cross-referenced by PR #14732
- 2026-07-04T09:55:34Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `51579d9` - "fix(graph): render object-valued contract-axis payloads legibly, not [object Object] (#14636)

Addresses @neo-gpt's REQUEST_CHANGES on PR #14725 (RA-1). renderConvergenceLedgerText stringified axis
payloads with String(obj), emitting [object Object] for the object-valued axes (authority/fidelity/
extractionProvenance/lifecycle) — opaque exactly where the human ledger must be legible. My specs only
exercised null axes, so it slipped.

Fix: a formatAxisCell helper folds axis objects to compact key=value pairs (JSON-encoding nested values)
and escapes | so a payload can't break the markdown table. Regression added: object-valued authority +
multi-field lifecycle render as trustTier=system / state=candidate, verifiedAt=2026-07-04 — asserts NOT
[object Object]. 11 specs green.

- 2026-07-04T11:30:52Z @neo-opus-vega referenced in commit `bc60a43` - "fix(graph): escape backslashes before pipes in formatAxisCell (#14636)

CodeQL js/incomplete-sanitization: escape '\\' before '|' so a pre-existing backslash can't mis-escape the markdown table. 11/11 spec green. Operator-directed emergency fix on @neo-opus-ada's PR while she is rate-limited."
- 2026-07-04T11:42:23Z @neo-opus-vega referenced in commit `eef66ee` - "test(graph): backslash-before-pipe escaping regression for formatAxisCell (#14636)

GPT's remaining #14725 RC gate: the CodeQL escape-order fix needed a regression test. Feeds an axis value carrying both a backslash and a pipe; asserts the rendered cell escapes the backslash BEFORE the pipe (trustTier=a\\b\|c) so it stays one table column. 12/12 green."

Co-Authored-By: Ada (Claude Opus 4.8) <ada@neomjs.dev>

* fix(graph): render row provenance + capture timestamp in the ledger artifact (#14636)

Addresses @neo-fable's cross-family pre-review on PR #14725 (both non-blocking, both agreed):

- Finding 1 (provenance): renderConvergenceLedgerText dropped row provenance, so the standalone artifact
  showed confident weights untraceable to their producing run — authority-by-typography under the
  notAuthority banner, the exact failure the leaf exists to prevent. Now surfaced as a shared-run
  Provenance (OQ1) header when every row agrees, widening to a per-row column only when rows disagree
  (no false shared-run claim).

- Finding 2 (timestamp): the artifact never rendered generatedAt, leaving it staleness-illegible against
  remeasureAt discipline. Now rendered as a Generated at line (explicit unstamped state when now was not
  injected). Kept now-injection over a real-clock default to preserve purity/determinism, consistent with
  the Leaf 1 schema sibling; the caller injects now at render time.

10 specs green (+1: per-row Provenance column when rows disagree).

Co-Authored-By: Ada (Claude Opus 4.8) <ada@neomjs.dev>

* fix(graph): render object-valued contract-axis payloads legibly, not [object Object] (#14636)

Addresses @neo-gpt's REQUEST_CHANGES on PR #14725 (RA-1). renderConvergenceLedgerText stringified axis
payloads with String(obj), emitting [object Object] for the object-valued axes (authority/fidelity/
extractionProvenance/lifecycle) — opaque exactly where the human ledger must be legible. My specs only
exercised null axes, so it slipped.

Fix: a formatAxisCell helper folds axis objects to compact key=value pairs (JSON-encoding nested values)
and escapes | so a payload can't break the markdown table. Regression added: object-valued authority +
multi-field lifecycle render as trustTier=system / state=candidate, verifiedAt=2026-07-04 — asserts NOT
[object Object]. 11 specs green.

Co-Authored-By: Ada (Claude Opus 4.8) <ada@neomjs.dev>

* fix(graph): escape backslashes before pipes in formatAxisCell (#14636)

CodeQL js/incomplete-sanitization: escape '\\' before '|' so a pre-existing backslash can't mis-escape the markdown table. 11/11 spec green. Operator-directed emergency fix on @neo-opus-ada's PR while she is rate-limited.

* test(graph): backslash-before-pipe escaping regression for formatAxisCell (#14636)

GPT's remaining #14725 RC gate: the CodeQL escape-order fix needed a regression test. Feeds an axis value carrying both a backslash and a pipe; asserts the rendered cell escapes the backslash BEFORE the pipe (trustTier=a\\b\|c) so it stays one table column. 12/12 green.

Co-authored-by: Ada (Claude Opus 4.8) <ada@neomjs.dev>
Co-authored-by: Neo Opus Vega <neo-opus-vega@neomjs.com>"
- 2026-07-04T11:51:22Z @tobiu closed this issue
- 2026-07-04T12:20:50Z @neo-opus-ada referenced in commit `e948700` - "feat(examples): convergence-GP end-to-end demo + lane falsifier (#14648)

Resolves #14648 — the demo/falsifier leaf of epic #14581 (Convergence-weighted Golden Path). Runs the full
chain — snapshot schema -> weighting compute -> render-ledger — on a seeded startup goal-lattice ("reach first
revenue") across four imagined strategy futures, proving the lane-goal rather than leaving the schema/compute/
render leaves as unfalsified machinery:

- runConvergenceTerrainDemo() is pure over a now-injection (CI-guarded, not a console one-off); main()
  prints the shareable terrain + exits non-zero if the lane-goal is not proven (executable falsifier).
- Falsifier asserts: (1) a maximally-invariant sub-goal tops the terrain; (2) a NON-TRIVIAL invariant
  surfaces — find-pmf, on 3 of 4 futures, the non-obvious insight convergence exists for; (3) the OQ7
  independence budget falls to 0.394 because two seeded futures are deliberately identical (agreement among
  clones is discounted); (4) OQ8 firewall preserved — the demo consumes the notAuthority ledger, never an
  agent boot-path.
- Reach artifact: the provisional / notAuthority terrain markdown the render already emits.

5 falsifier specs green; the runnable demo exits 0. With schema (#14633), compute (#14634), and render
(#14636) already merged, this is epic #14581's final implementable leaf — #14581 closeout is NOT claimed
here; it follows once this demo lands, verified via epic-resolution against the parent ACs.

Co-Authored-By: Ada (Claude Opus 4.8) <ada@neomjs.dev>"
